summary: Test suite covers core happy path well (status classification, report generation, format support) but has significant gaps: CLI parameters (OutputPath, NowOverride, FailOnExpired) largely untested, boundary conditions absent (daysUntilExpiry=0 or =WarningDays), file I/O errors not tested (file-not-found, invalid JSON parsing), empty secrets array not tested, and FailOnExpired exit(2) behavior untested. Test count matches workflow expectations (12 tests) and markdown output format validation would catch regressions in core logic, but exit code behavior and parameter variations would slip through.
